description: basic interface and VLAN from Cisco to Huawei
config:
hostname SW1
vlan 10
 name Users
interface Vlan10
 ip address 192.168.10.1 255.255.255.0
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 switchport mode access
 switchport access vlan 10
 spanning-tree portfast

description: OSPF single area from H3C to Huawei
config:
ospf 1 router-id 1.1.1.1
 area 0.0.0.0
  network 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
interface GigabitEthernet1/0/1
 ospf cost 10

description: BGP basic from Cisco to Huawei
config:
router bgp 65000
 bgp router-id 1.1.1.1
 neighbor 10.0.0.1 remote-as 65001
 neighbor 10.0.0.1 description PEER1
 address-family ipv4
  network 192.168.0.0 mask 255.255.255.0
  neighbor 10.0.0.1 activate

interface Vlan10
 ip address 192.168.10.1 255.255.255.0
 standby 1 ip 192.168.10.254
 standby 1 priority 110
 standby 1 preempt

description: static route from Cisco to H3C
extended ACL from Cisco to Huawei
config:
ip access-list extended BLOCK_TELNET
 deny tcp any any eq telnet
 permit ip any any

description: CDP is unsupported on Huawei — should skip or MANUAL_REVIEW
config:
cdp run
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 cdp enable

description: NAT PAT overload from Cisco to Huawei
config:
ip access-list standard NAT_POOL
 permit 192.168.0.0 0.0.255.255
ip nat inside source list NAT_POOL interface GigabitEthernet0/0 overload
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 ip nat outside
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 ip nat inside

lldp global enable
interface GigabitEthernet1/0/1
 lldp enable
 lldp tlv-enable basic-tlv management-address

description: QoS class-map from Cisco to Huawei
config:
class-map match-any VOICE
 match ip dscp ef
policy-map QOS_POLICY
 class VOICE
  priority level 1
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 service-policy output QOS_POLICY

description: DCN is Huawei-only — unsupported to H3C, should skip
config:
dcn
 dcn router-id 1.1.1.1
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 dcn

spanning-tree mode rstp
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 spanning-tree portfast

description: DHCP server pool from Cisco to H3C
config:
ip dhcp pool LAN
 network 192.168.10.0 255.255.255.0
 default-router 192.168.10.1
 dns-server 8.8.8.8
 lease 7
